title: poa alpina var. molinerii
intro: Poa alpina var. molinerii is a variety of the alpine meadow grass, Poa alpina, a type of wild grass native to the mountainous regions of Europe. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory problems. Poa alpina var. molinerii can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine.
